SELECT
  'SME' AS Segment1,
  'LAM' AS Segment2,
  (SELECT AVG(total_consumption) FROM (
     SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
     FROM yearmonth y
     JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
     WHERE y.Date LIKE '2013-%' AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
     GROUP BY y.CustomerID
   ) AS sub
   WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
  (SELECT AVG(total_consumption) FROM (
     SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
     FROM yearmonth y
     JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
     WHERE y.Date LIKE '2013-%' AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
     GROUP BY y.CustomerID
   ) AS sub
   WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS Difference
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'LAM',
  'KAM',
  (SELECT AVG(total_consumption) FROM (
     SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
     FROM yearmonth y
     JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
     WHERE y.Date LIKE '2013-%' AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
     GROUP BY y.CustomerID
   ) AS sub
   WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
  (SELECT AVG(total_consumption) FROM (
     SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
     FROM yearmonth y
     JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
     WHERE y.Date LIKE '2013-%' AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
     GROUP BY y.CustomerID
   ) AS sub
   WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS Difference
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'KAM',
  'SME',
  (SELECT AVG(total_consumption) FROM (
     SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
     FROM yearmonth y
     JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
     WHERE y.Date LIKE '2013-%' AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
     GROUP BY y.CustomerID
   ) AS sub
   WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
  (SELECT AVG(total_consumption) FROM (
     SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
     FROM yearmonth y
     JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
     WHERE y.Date LIKE '2013-%' AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
     GROUP BY y.CustomerID
   ) AS sub
   WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS Difference;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
WITH yearly AS (
    SELECT c.Segment,
           substr(y.Date, 1, 4) AS yr,
           SUM(y.Consumption) AS total
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
    GROUP BY c.Segment, yr
),
growth AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           SUM(CASE WHEN yr = '2013' THEN total END) AS total2013,
           SUM(CASE WHEN yr = '2012' THEN total END) AS total2012
    FROM yearly
    GROUP BY Segment
),
calc AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           (total2013 - total2012) / total2012 * 100.0 AS growth
    FROM growth
)
SELECT Segment, growth FROM calc ORDER BY growth DESC LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT Segment, growth FROM calc ORDER BY growth ASC LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

WITH RECURSIVE split_tags(id, tag, rest) AS (
  SELECT p.Id,
         CASE
           WHEN instr(p.Tags, '><') > 0 THEN substr(p.Tags, 2, instr(p.Tags, '><')-2)
           ELSE substr(p.Tags, 2, length(p.Tags)-2)
         END AS tag,
         CASE
           WHEN instr(p.Tags, '><') > 0 THEN substr(p.Tags, instr(p.Tags, '><')+2)
           ELSE ''
         END AS rest
  FROM posts p
  WHERE p.OwnerDisplayName = 'Mark McKess'
    AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM comments c WHERE c.PostId = p.Id)
    AND p.Tags IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT id,
         substr(rest, 1, instr(rest, '><')-1) AS tag,
         substr(rest, instr(rest, '><')+2) AS rest
  FROM split_tags
  WHERE rest <> '' AND instr(rest, '><') > 0
  UNION ALL
  SELECT id,
         rest AS tag,
         '' AS rest
  FROM split_tags
  WHERE rest <> '' AND instr(rest, '><') = 0
)
SELECT DISTINCT tag
FROM split_tags;	----- bird -----	codebase_community

WITH oldest_females AS (
    SELECT client_id
    FROM client
    WHERE gender = 'F'
      AND birth_date = (SELECT MAX(birth_date) FROM client WHERE gender = 'F')
),
accounts_of_oldest AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT disp.account_id
    FROM disp
    JOIN oldest_females ON disp.client_id = oldest_females.client_id
),
avg_income_per_account AS (
    SELECT account_id, AVG(amount) AS avg_income
    FROM trans
    GROUP BY account_id
),
lowest_avg_of_oldest AS (
    SELECT MIN(avg_income) AS lowest_avg
    FROM avg_income_per_account
    WHERE account_id IN (SELECT account_id FROM accounts_of_oldest)
),
highest_avg AS (
    SELECT MAX(avg_income) AS highest_avg
    FROM avg_income_per_account
)
SELECT a.account_id,
       (h.highest_avg - l.lowest_avg) AS difference
FROM avg_income_per_account a
JOIN accounts_of_oldest ao ON a.account_id = ao.account_id
CROSS JOIN lowest_avg_of_oldest l
CROSS JOIN highest_avg h
WHERE a.avg_income = l.lowest_avg;	----- bird -----	financial

    WHERE birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client)

    FROM disp d
    WHERE d.client_id IN (SELECT client_id FROM youngest_clients)

    FROM client_accounts ca
    JOIN trans t ON t.account_id = ca.account_id
